fileContext.overview: Defines a cache for file contexts.

symbols.name: CacheEntry
symbols.behavior: Has three properties: contentHash, fileContext, and cachedAt.
symbols.limitations: Must have contentHash, fileContext, and cachedAt properties.

symbols.name: cacheFileContext
symbols.behavior: Stores a file context in the cache.
symbols.limitations: Must store the file context in the cache.

symbols.name: getCachedFileContext
symbols.behavior: Returns the cached file context or null if not cached.
symbols.limitations: Must return the cached file context or null.

symbols.name: hasCachedContext
symbols.purpose: Checks if a cached context exists.
symbols.behavior: Returns true if a cached context exists, false otherwise.
symbols.limitations: Must return true if a cached context exists, false otherwise.
